github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use Conventional Commits format: <type>(<scope>): <description>. Types: feat (minor bump), fix (patch bump), docs, style, refactor, perf, test, chore, ci. Use ! after type for breaking changes (major bump). Scopes: api, ui, auth, db, docker, sync, rules, notifications, scheduler. Description must be lowercase, imperative mood, no period at end. English only.
